Bash(VIVI_TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJleHAiOjE3NzM2OTczNzYsImlhdCI6MTc3MzY5NTU3Niwic3ViIjoiN2FmNjU3ZGEtZjhhMC00YmE5LWFkZWQtZGVjMDRiYmNmNWZlIiwidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.1tKHDutVp7kSeL2HJLhh6zV1kTlD0O8HVPdfPC3RGl4"
FAFFI_TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJleHAiOjE3NzM2OTczNzIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzY5NTU3Miwic3ViIjoiY2Y5YzYxMmYtYTU3Yi00ZjFiLTgxNWUtMmEwYzMxNGY2Mzg3IiwidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.Cr5nZQ4iVNyN8HC7KIMhZGNOBecHeWREQ_xpWv7cb9s"
BASE="https://api.wippestoolen.de/api/v1"
S1_ID="06f15fff-7532-4778-9bf1-3a51d3f7dc4c"

echo "=== S1 booking full detail ==="
curl -s "$BASE/bookings/$S1_ID" -H "Authorization: Bearer $FAFFI_TOKEN" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Status:', d.get\('status'\)\)
print\('confirmed_at:', d.get\('confirmed_at'\)\)
print\('started_at:', d.get\('started_at'\)\)
print\('completed_at:', d.get\('completed_at'\)\)
print\('picked_up_at:', d.get\('picked_up_at'\)\)
print\('returned_at:', d.get\('returned_at'\)\)
"

echo ""
echo "=== Check review eligibility ==="
curl -s "$BASE/reviews/bookings/$S1_ID/review-eligibility" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $VIVI_TOKEN" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Try review creation - full error ==="
curl -s -i -X POST "$BASE/reviews" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $VIVI_TOKEN" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d "{\\"booking_id\\":\\"$S1_ID\\",\\"rating\\":5,\\"comment\\":\\"Super Werkzeug!\\",\\"title\\":\\"Toller Verleiher\\"}")
